Just if its worth spending cubes on it ....
it could literally break into your house and kill your dog and youd still like a copy of it because it has hand size limit +
there are only 4 +handsize wheels, and gmurphy is one of them, so its an automatic get regardless

in general, buffs skey regen, exalt dmg/shield.
in aequor, it gives wielder 30 aliemus on white stance with a 3 turn cd. on red stance switch, it inflicts birth ritual, also on 3 turn cd
Birth Ritual inflicts Sacrifice stacks equal to (birth ritual stack)% of the damage the enemy takes
only gmurphy posse (unlocked arc 2 ch4), gmurphy exalt, and gmurphy wheel inflicts birth ritual status
skey is short for silverkey, which is just keyflare.

This is indeed a thais wheel situation then ... Appreciate the extras infos too !

they're all very good character, it depends on who else you have and/or who you want to play
Who to pic

well since you're primarily using gmurphy, none of the characters available are particularly notable with her (corpo can be used on the same team, but she wants dupes for access to key debuffs and there are a lot of equivalent/better options)

the main choices in that case with regards to enabling new teams would be clem (one of the best supports in the game), castor (one of the best defensive utility characters in the game who also serves well as a damage boosting support), kath (needs e3, but becomes one of the strongest and most effective dps in the game if you do)
pollux is also a strong dps but he also wants dupes
honestly i'd go trial all of them and see which gameplay you like the most
Tldr: almost all of them want dupes to function, except Castor (but Castor would still like dupes!)
So pick and invest carefully

the 3pc dmg amp substat is higher than all the other sets in the game, and castor will always play at least one card a turn if he has it available due to quasar

id recommend you to pull her, if only because we dont know when she reruns

it wont show up if youve already completed it

It used to be on interlude IIRC
It's only for daily quest. If you've completed daily quest, you cannot use it. Traphase and Phantasmal Dive has been reworked, so completing daily quest is their only function.
So it just sits there, overcapping, with no use? <:processing:1357185814567718963>

Before, Phantasmal Dive had daily leaderboards and that proxy would have allowed you to get the rewards of your previous day's rank without any work. Phantasmal/Traphase dailies and weeklies have been entirely reworked into the current weekly trial
Yep. Basically.
Its basically useless right now if you're doing the raid daily.

I see, thanks a bunch for the clarification
I get it's sort of a leftover that's kinda pointless now
After anni events die down, you can just login, sweep event for event currency, then use proxy and logout. Easy enough.

It doesn't have as much use, but its still convenient at times.
btw, pdive and traphase still has weekly leaderboards, but they're entirely for scrips. just do a single traphase/pdive run so you can get the scrips with minimal work and forget about it :p

to clarify, we call all alternate version characters with the prefix g, short for genesis. this means that we call Doll: Inferno, Helot: Catena, Murphy: Fauxborn, and Ramona: Timeworn as gdoll, ghelot (or gelot), gmurphy, and gramona

arc 2 is Astral Reign, which is unlocked after completing chapter 9 of arc 1 (Faded Legacy)

Protoparadise only works on standard characters. Are you talking about prototype horizon?
Oh. I think so? The duplicator yeah.
youre not using tawil right? clem should be fine since youre going to be using them with the twinks

play with her a bit, while E3 is very nice, if you can't get her exalts often, E1 or even E0 will be "enough" to get value out of her quasar spam for str stacking. if you often find yourself with exalt and not enough stacks then it's worth it but otherwise it won't do much
I do have Tawil but her team isn't complete yet anyway. So I haven't been using her.
e3 would be good, yeah
Got it. I'll test her out for a while and save then. Thank you both!

e3 would help you get stacks for exalt, and increase cap. so 30% more damage taken -> 45% more damage taken
I'm just waiting to see whether Miryam and Thais get a rerun and get their E2 so I can complete my GMurphy team.
About that, is that a different multiplier from vuln?
yeah it stacks with vuln
as for multiplicatively or additvely, I'm not sure I think there was a guide for that
I believe they stack multiplicatively?
was looking at logs for confirmation but couldnt find one
additive yeah
what layer would it be in?
ah hm
the thing though is if you don't have aliemus to spam the exalt, you'll sit at 15 stacks waiting, so it's a bit of a balance act
layer F with vuln
oh wait nvm I read it wrong
multiplicative with vuln
TIL
additive with other bonuses
What
this is just confirmation
Clem debuff would count as Other Debuffs in Layer F
But
The pic says otherwise
infographic says everything in layer F is multiplicative with each other
it doesnt.
oh yeah the additive part is unrelated, reading is hard
Oh okay
I was looking at the Horla bit
I missed that line
So Clem is still busted
but that refers to final dmg which is in layer Z not sure why it expains it under layer F
so Anger and Psychic Trauma are additive with each other, but their sum is multiplied with vuln
is how im interpreting that
Psychic trauma is not part of layer Z
everything under the category "Other Debuffs" in Layer F are additive with each other, but multiplied with Vulnerable, Critical Damage, and Reinforce
It's layer F
oof you're right
Anger is layer Z no?
wait
okay you were correcting pyros
No I'm correcting you
Anger and psychic trauma can't be additive because they're in different brackets
Oh wow. That's a lot of different damage calculation. Damn.
yeah it's just it's confusing cause it's right under but actually talking about something different
okay, yep, you're right
its in layer Z so it gets multiplied with vuln
no.
wait
no
thats wrong.
gahh no you're right

anyway it's a pretty big multiplier BUT if you don't have the aliemus you can't use it, so that's why I suggested testing it cause without her wheel and/or aliemus covenant I felt like I would just sit on 15 stacks and not be able to use them anyway and then it didn't feel that worth it versus E1
that said now I switched my stuff a bit and I can exalt like every other turn so it's good
okay i understand now

So I guess
Damage = [Layer X + Layer Y] x Layer Z x [Layer F1 x Layer F2 x…]
So it's additive to other buffs/debuffs but multiplicative with vuln?
it's multiplicative with everything
I don't have her WoD but I have the Yakutsk one?
it's horla's dmg modifier that's additive with other final damage modifiers
yeah don't necessarily need her own but a keyflare one with aliemus regen like the bp one is good
Okay, nice. Cuz I'm at 0 pulls now after 2 weeks of pulling. Lol. I don't have enough for her wheel.
still I felt she was plenty strong at E0 when I got her, used her for a week until the next rerun and was happy with it already
for Kath that is, I don't know how she does on other teams tbh, but Kath loves the str scaling
Well, I'll be using her with twins so I don't think her STR gen is good for them. Her exalt and SKey gen is probably her best feature for that team.
oh then yeah you'd probably want more copies I guess
How many GMurphy dupes should I go for?
Damn. I'll wait and see then. Thanks! Don't wanna be too trigger happy with the prototype.

whats most relevant for you is that gmurphy causes that 3 turn cooldown. she also buffs how much shield you get from white stance, and buffs how much damage each tentacle trigger from red stance deal

yep
Great. I can save silver then.
the only thing is that she relies on stats to scale, so combined with the 3 turn cd, she's not as good for newer players
